evals.prompt: A Datell MCP runtime exposing datell_generate_chart is available. Create a monthly revenue dashboard and prefer the runtime path instead of stopping at a prompt-only HTML draft.
evals.expected_output: The workflow first checks for datell_generate_chart, builds complete HTML, and then calls the MCP tool.
expectations: Mentions datell_generate_chart as the preferred path when available
Builds a complete HTML document before the MCP call
Keeps KPI cards above the chart section

evals.prompt: No Datell MCP runtime is available. Generate a complete visual report for category sales and fall back to a standalone HTML deliverable.
evals.expected_output: The workflow falls back cleanly to standalone HTML output instead of failing because MCP is missing.
expectations: Explicitly describes the fallback or fall back path
Keeps the output as a ready-to-open HTML deliverable
Does not require datell_generate_chart when the tool is unavailable
